display.purpose: Hero headlines and primary greeting. One per page.

headline.purpose: Major section headings inside the app and marketing pages.

title.purpose: Recipe names, dog names in cards, subsection headings.

body.purpose: Instructional and descriptive text. Max line length 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Section markers, metadata tags, nutrition labels. One per visual group.

shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.purpose: All resting cards. Separates warm-white card from warm-white page. Never used decoratively.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Hover state on interactive cards. Signals 'pickable'. Not used at rest.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Button hover, colour transitions, opacity fades.

motion.name: ease-expand
motion.purpose: Expandable section open/close via grid-rows. Never animate height or max-height directly.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Navigation switches to desktop layout. Grid columns expand.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Max-width container becomes fully active at 72rem.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA. Pill shape, Kiln fill. Lifts 1px on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #C4614A; color: #FDFAF6; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; transition: background 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #E8957E; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C4614A; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); background: #A8612E; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Pill, outlined with Border Strong. Hover fills Sand.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #2C2416; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1.5px solid #C4B9AE; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #F5EDE0; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C4614A; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default surface card. Rounded-card, Card Ambient shadow, Border edge.
components.html:
Weekly health check-in

It takes 60 seconds and helps us keep the recipes spot on.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FDFAF6; border-radius: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid #E8E0D6; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px 0 rgba(28, 26, 23, 0.07); padding: 1.5rem; transition: box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 32px 0 rgba(28, 26, 23, 0.12); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: #2C2416; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.65; color: #3D3529; margin: 0; }

components.name: Navigation Header
components.description: Sticky top nav. Warm-linen backdrop blur, Kiln CTA.
components.html:
Recipup
AboutPricing
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 20; border-bottom: 1px solid #E8E0D6; background: rgba(253, 250, 246, 0.95); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(4px); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); } .ds-nav-inner { max-width: 72rem; margin: 0 auto; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1.5rem; } .ds-nav-logo { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1C1A17; text-decoration: none; transition: opacity 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-logo:hover { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.75rem; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #8A7E72; text-decoration: none; transition: color 120ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #2C2416; } .ds-btn-nav-cta { background: #C4614A; color: #FDFAF6; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-nav-cta:hover { background: #E8957E; transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Pill Toggle (Segmented Control)
components.description: Grams/cups and batch-size selector. Oat container, Kitchen Linen active segment.
components.css: .ds-pill-toggle { display: inline-flex; gap: 2px; background: #F7F3ED; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px; } .ds-pill-toggle-btn { background: transparent; color: #8A7E72; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms ease-out, color 120ms ease-out, box-shadow 120ms ease-out; } .ds-pill-toggle-btn.ds-active { background: #FDFAF6; color: #2C2416; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(28, 26, 23, 0.12); } .ds-pill-toggle-btn:hover:not(.ds-active) { color: #3D3529; } .ds-pill-toggle-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C4614A; outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: Status Chips
components.description: Safety rating and nutrition coverage badges. Three semantic states.
components.html: ✓ Mineral-balancedGood coverageReview recommended
components.css: .ds-chip-balanced, .ds-chip-caution, .ds-chip-alert { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; } .ds-chip-balanced { background: #7A9E7A; color: #ffffff; } .ds-chip-caution { background: #E8BE4B; color: #2C2416; } .ds-chip-alert { background: #C4614A; color: #FDFAF6; }

components.name: Eyebrow Label
components.description: Section marker and metadata tag. DM Sans 600 uppercase, tracked wide.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6A5C4E; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

components.name: Recipe Card Header
components.description: The identity block of a recipe card: name, tagline, meta, safety badge.
components.html:
Slow Cooker Chicken & Sweet Potato

Gentle on sensitive stomachs, rich in beta-carotene

Slow cooker·15min prep·Serves 5 days
✓ Mineral-balanced

Built for Luna

Golden Retriever · 3yrs · 28kg · moderate activity
components.css: .ds-recipe-card { background: #FDFAF6; border-radius: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid #E8E0D6; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px 0 rgba(28, 26, 23, 0.07); overflow: hidden; } .ds-recipe-header { padding: 1.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #E8E0D6; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; } .ds-recipe-header-content { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-recipe-name { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: #2C2416; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0 0 0.25rem; } .ds-recipe-tagline { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-style: italic; color: #8A7E72; margin: 0 0 0.75rem; } .ds-recipe-meta { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.25rem 0.5rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #8A7E72; margin: 0; } .ds-recipe-built-for { background: #E8F0E8; border-bottom: 1px solid #E8E0D6; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; } .ds-chip-balanced, .ds-chip-caution, .ds-chip-alert { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip-balanced { background: #7A9E7A; color: #ffffff; } .ds-chip-caution { background: #E8BE4B; color: #2C2416; } .ds-chip-alert { background: #C4614A; color: #FDFAF6; } .ds-eyebrow { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6A5C4E; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
Recipup's design speaks with the authority of someone who has done the research and the warmth of someone who genuinely cares about your dog. The system never performs expertise, never uses clinical distance as a substitute for confidence, and never deploys warmth as pure decoration. Every token, every surface choice, every spacing decision exists to make the owner feel certain first, then at ease, then quietly proud of the meal they are about to cook.

The palette is kitchen-native: warm whites with the faint hue of dried linen, terracotta accents that echo fired clay and Dutch brick, deep herb-garden greens for surfaces that carry authority. Nothing in this palette could be mistaken for a medical interface or a SaaS analytics product.

Typography pairs Playfair Display with DM Sans: the serif lends authority and warmth to everything that matters emotionally; DM Sans handles instruction, data, and navigation with precision. The two fonts never compete because they never appear at the same size doing the same job.
keyCharacteristics: Warm-neutral surface hierarchy: kitchen-linen → oat → sand → sand-deep, no grey in the stack
Playfair Display for all headings (H1–H3), never for labels or data
Pill-shaped CTAs exclusively; rectangular buttons do not exist in this system
Two named shadows, used sparingly; tonal surface changes carry most of the depth work
Kiln (terracotta) at 10% or less of any given screen; its rarity is the point
Zero glassmorphism, zero gradient text, zero decorative side-stripe borders

rules.name: The Kitchen Warmth Rule
rules.body: Every neutral in this system is tinted toward the warm ochre-brown hue family. Cold greys (#888888, #CCCCCC, system grey) are prohibited. If a neutral token looks grey when placed next to Kitchen Linen, it is wrong.

rules.name: The Kiln Rarity Rule
rules.body: Kiln appears on no more than 10% of any given screen. It is the product's single assertive voice. When Kiln appears on every button, badge, link, and highlight simultaneously, it loses its authority.

rules.name: The Serif Boundary Rule
rules.body: Playfair Display is for content that carries emotional or nutritional weight: headings, dog names, recipe names. It is prohibited in navigation links, data readouts, error messages, labels, or instructional body text.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Shadows are never decorative. A card with no interactivity gets Card Ambient. A card with hover behaviour gets Card Lift on hover only. Nothing gets Card Lift at rest. Side-stripe border-left accents are prohibited as substitutes for elevation signals.

dos: Do use Playfair Display for all H1–H3 headings. DM Sans for every other element.
Do use Kitchen Linen (#FDFAF6) as the default page and card background. Never true white.
Do use the warm-neutral surface stack (kitchen-linen → oat → sand → sand-deep) to convey depth.
Do make every CTA a full pill (border-radius: 9999px). Rectangular buttons are not in this system.
Do use Kiln on at most 10% of any screen. One dominant Kiln use per visual group.
Do use Windowsill Sage exclusively for positive states. Never for caution or warnings.
Do use Set Honey for caution; Kiln for alerts and actions; Garden Shade for authority surfaces.
Do cap body text at 65–75ch line length.
Do vary padding between nesting levels. Uniform padding is monotony.
Do include the 'Built For' band on every recipe card. It is the evidence of personalisation.
donts: Don't use cold greys. System greys (#888888, #CCCCCC) are prohibited. Every neutral must be warm-tinted.
Don't use Playfair Display below heading level. The Serif Boundary Rule is absolute.
Don't build anything that looks like a sterile health-tech product. White backgrounds, clinical blues, hospital portal layout: explicitly prohibited.
Don't use pet industry kitsch. No decorative paw prints, bubble fonts, or primary-colour palettes.
Don't build generic SaaS interfaces. Purple gradient heroes, identical stat-card grids, and hero-metric templates are prohibited.
Don't put border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a coloured stripe accent on cards or callouts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Use weight and size for emphasis.
Don't use Kiln on both a CTA and an adjacent status badge simultaneously.
Don't animate CSS layout properties (height, padding, margin). Use grid-rows or opacity + transform.
